name: Justice Surya Kant
notes: 53rd CJI. Born 10 Feb 1962. Nominated by CJI B.R. Gavai. Appointed by President Droupadi Murmu.

name: Justice Vikram Nath
notes: Born 24 Sep 1962. Next in seniority after CJI. Expected 54th CJI (Feb–Sep 2027).

name: Justice B.V. Nagarathna
notes: Born 30 Oct 1962. Expected to be 55th CJI (Sep–Oct 2027) — India's first woman CJI.

name: Allahabad High Court
notes: Serves Uttar Pradesh. Largest HC by sanctioned strength.

name: Justice Arun Bhansali
notes: Joined from Rajasthan HC. Retires Oct 2029.

name: Andhra Pradesh High Court
notes: Established 1 Jan 2019 after bifurcation of AP. Seat: Amaravati.

name: Justice Lisa Gill
notes: Appointed ~May 2026. Succeeded Justice Dhiraj Singh Thakur (retired 24 Apr 2026). Nominated by CJI Surya Kant.

name: Bombay High Court
notes: Serves Maharashtra; Goa; Dadra & Nagar Haveli; Daman & Diu.

name: Calcutta High Court
notes: Serves West Bengal and Andaman & Nicobar Islands.

name: Justice Sujoy Paul
notes: Joined from MP HC. Retiring Jun 2026 — very soon.

name: Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya
notes: Previously 47th CJ of Bombay HC. Joined Delhi 21 Jan 2025. Nominated by both CJI D.Y. Chandrachud and CJI Sanjiv Khanna.

name: Gauhati High Court
notes: Serves Assam; Nagaland; Mizoram; Arunachal Pradesh.

name: J&K and Ladakh High Court
notes: Serves J&K and Ladakh Union Territories.

name: Justice Mahesh Sharadchandra Sonak
notes: Joined from Bombay HC. Note: Exact retirement date from DoJ PDF was unclear (entry error); estimated Dec 2026.

name: Justice Soumen Sen
notes: Joined Kerala 10 Jan 2026. Previously 14th CJ of Meghalaya HC.

name: Madras High Court
notes: Serves Tamil Nadu and Puducherry. One of oldest HCs.

name: Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari
notes: Succeeded M.M. Shrivastava (retired 05 Mar 2026). Nominated by CJI Surya Kant.

name: Justice T. Vinod Kumar
notes: Transferred from Telangana HC (Jul 2025). Full name: Tadakamalla Vinod Kumar.

name: Justice Hemant Chandangoudar
notes: Transferred from Karnataka HC (May 2025). Addl Judge Karnataka from 11/11/2019; Perm 08/09/2021.

name: Justice Shamim Ahmed
notes: Joined Madras HC 30/09/2024 (transferred from Allahabad HC).

name: Justice Mummineni Sudheer Kumar
notes: Joined Madras HC 23/11/2023 (transferred from Telangana HC).

name: Justice Kasoju Surendhar
notes: Transferred from Telangana HC (May 2025). Also known as K. Surender.

name: Mrs. Justice L. Victoria Gowri
notes: Full name: Lekshmana Chandra Victoria Gowri.

name: Justice R. Sakthivel
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 21 Jul 1973. Service source.

name: Justice P. Dhanabal
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 05 Mar 1974. Service source.

name: Justice C. Kumarappan
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 15 Jul 1972. Service source.

name: Justice K. Rajasekar
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 29 Apr 1975. Service source.

name: Justice N. Senthilkumar
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 12 Oct 1970. Bar source.

name: Justice G. Arul Murugan
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 27 May 1976. Bar source.

name: Ms. Justice R. Poornima
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 03 Jul 1966. Service source.

name: Justice M. Jothiraman
notes: Additional Judge. DOB 04 Jun 1972. Service source.

name: Dr. Justice A.D. Maria Clete
notes: Additional Judge. Full name: Augustine Devadoss Maria Clete. DOB 06 Nov 1965.

name: Justice Revati Prashant Mohite Dere
notes: Joined from Bombay HC. Retires Nov 2026.

name: Justice Harish Tandon
notes: Joined from Calcutta HC. One of most senior HC judges by initial elevation.

name: Justice Sangam Kumar Sahoo
notes: Joined from Orissa HC. Retiring 04 Jun 2026 — only ~23 days away.

name: Punjab & Haryana High Court
notes: Serves Punjab; Haryana; Chandigarh UT. Seat: Chandigarh.

name: Rajasthan High Court
notes: Principal seat: Jodhpur; Bench at Jaipur.

name: Justice Sanjeev Prakash Sharma
notes: Acting CJ from home court. Retires Sep 2026.

name: Justice Aparesh Kumar Singh
notes: Joined Telangana 19 Jul 2025. Previously 8th CJ of Tripura HC.

name: Justice M.S. Sri Ramachandra Rao
notes: Joined Tripura 22 Jul 2025. Previously 28th CJ of Himachal Pradesh HC.

name: Justice Manoj Kumar Gupta
notes: Joined from Allahabad HC. Retires Oct 2026.
